entities.name: PEANUT
entities.description: Nutrient-rich legume crop known for protein and healthy fat contents

entities.name: PROTEIN CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of protein present in peanuts

entities.name: FAT CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of fat present in peanuts

entities.name: SHELF-LIFE
entities.description: The duration for which peanut oil and products remain usable

entities.name: MOISTURE LEVEL
entities.description: The degree of moisture affecting the shelf-life of peanut oil

entities.name: FATTY ACIDS
entities.description: Components of peanut oil that determine its shelf-life

entities.name: HIGH OLEIC ACID CONTENT
entities.description: High levels of C18:1 fatty acid providing stability and nutrition

entities.name: THERMO-OXIDATIVE STABILITY
entities.description: The stability of peanut oil under heat and oxidation

entities.name: NUTRITIONAL VALUE
entities.description: The health-related value of the crop

entities.name: HEALTH BENEFITS
entities.description: Positive health effects derived from high-oleate peanuts

entities.name: CAPS MARKERS
entities.description: Cleaved Amplified Polymorphic Sequences used to develop high-oleate peanut germplasm

entities.name: AS-PCR MARKERS
entities.description: Allele-Specific PCR markers used to develop high-oleate peanut germplasm

entities.name: HIGH-OLEATE GERMPLASM
entities.description: Genetic material of peanuts with high oleic acid content

entities.name: FLAVOR
entities.description: Taste characteristic determining consumption quality and commercial value

entities.name: TEXTURE
entities.description: Physical feel of peanut products determining consumption quality and commercial value

entities.name: CONSUMPTION QUALITY
entities.description: The overall quality of peanut products from a consumer perspective

entities.name: COMMERCIAL VALUE
entities.description: The market value of peanut products

entities.name: FIRM AND CRISPY TEXTURE
entities.description: A preferred textural characteristic of peanuts

entities.name: SOFT AND MUSHY TEXTURE
entities.description: A less preferred textural characteristic of peanuts

entities.name: PEANUT ALLERGENS
entities.description: Substances in peanuts that cause allergic reactions

entities.name: HYPOALLERGENICITY
entities.description: The state of having reduced allergenicity in peanuts

entities.name: TRANSGENIC TECHNOLOGY
entities.description: The use of foreign DNA to modify peanuts

entities.name: GENOME EDITING
entities.description: Precise modification of the peanut genome to reduce allergens

entities.name: CIS-GENESIS
entities.description: Genetic modification using genes from the same or closely related species

entities.name: TRANS-GENESIS
entities.description: Genetic modification using genes from different species

entities.name: ZFN
entities.description: Zinc Finger Nucleases used as a gene-editing tool

entities.name: TALEN
entities.description: Transcription Activator-Like Effector Nucleases used as a gene-editing tool

entities.name: RNAI
entities.description: RNA interference used to reduce allergenic proteins

entities.name: CRISPR/CAS9
entities.description: Clustered Regularly Interspaced Short Palindromic Repeats used as a gene-editing tool

entities.name: ALLERGENIC PROTEINS
entities.description: Specific proteins responsible for peanut allergies
